The evidence cited across the provided context consistently states: “The backup retention period is exactly seven years according to the cited document.” However, **no actual excerpt, citation, or identifier of the cited document is provided** in any of the fragments. All three sources (a partner bulletin, an FAQ answer labeled as a “copied low-confidence claim,” and several secondary sources) repeat this claim verbatim but offer **no independent verification, document title, section, or authoritative source reference**. Moreover, the FAQ explicitly cautions reviewers to treat the statement as a “copied low-confidence claim,” indicating lack of evidentiary support.

Thus, while the *claim* about a seven-year retention period is repeatedly asserted, **there is no substantive evidence provided in the context to substantiate it**—only unverified repetition.
